subject: An anime-style figure with short reddish-brown hair in a blue performance costume, standing in a stage or performance setting with dramatic lighting
description: The card art — viewed at medium resolution through the Weiss Schwarz card frame — depicts an anime-style character with short reddish-brown hair standing in what appears to be a performance or stage environment. The character wears a blue and dark costume appropriate to a 'Blue Crystal' variant designation. The background features dramatic lighting with what appears to be stage lights or bokeh effects in deep pink-red tones, suggesting a concert or stage performance setting. The character's pose is confident and performance-ready. At 400x558 resolution, fine details of costume embellishment are not fully legible, but the overall composition and character palette are clear.
foreground: anime figure with short reddish-brown hair in blue performance costume, confident stance
background: stage or concert setting with dramatic pink-red lighting effects
